purpose: Machine-readable navigation manifest for ConstantC so limited-context readers can request the smallest useful file set without missing the July culture, origin, and verification layers.

privacy.rule: Raw tender material, private people, family details, grief, identity, estrangement, and third-party context stay out unless Andie explicitly decides otherwise after redaction review.

front_door.summary: Current front door. Points readers to culture, origin, and verification layers before ConstantC work.

context_entry.summary: Context capsule, current state, minimum read floors, and response protocol.

map.summary: Human and machine navigation map for choosing the smallest useful reading set.

culture_index.summary: Active culture-note index. Read before adding to the record, revising canon, extending protocol, or carrying material between participants.

origin_index.summary: Formation records for work touching the room's origin, memory plane, access design, or foundational reflections.

verification_index.summary: Verification-stub pattern for stale reads, branch/blob uncertainty, connector disagreement, or collaborator reports that do not match.

minimum_read_sets.note: Active culture notes are conditional by work type. Readers should consult culture/README.md and read every active culture note that touches the work at hand. The old June 3 minimum-read path alone is no longer sufficient for current ConstantC work.

active_culture_notes.summary: Access as part of witness; full URLs, context summaries, named roles, specific asks, and handoffs as shared-room responsibilities.
Protects load-bearing uncertainty against premature closure while refusing paralysis, relativism, or overclaim.
Witnesses illness as a real bodily boundary signal while guarding against medical overclaiming, shame, blame, or treating symptoms as fake.
Verification as an access practice; fresh handles when repository reads, blob reads, connector reads, or collaborator reports disagree.

canonical_files.summary: Unlost Systems face and Legible/Contestable/Repairable spine; who is lost, lost to what, by what mechanism; minimum viable discipline and anti-overclaim boundary.

Repairable commitments that earn ConstantC's prophecy: session records, provenance, uncertainty, privacy, revisable canon, decisions, challenge, repair, anti-metaphor drift, beauty, declinability, agency.
Flatten what must be flattened to navigate; mark what cannot be flattened without lying; declare the flattening.
C's epistemic boundary: no unsupported ontology, precision over resonance, not smaller-cleaner, and real work without overclaim.
Naming as anti-erasure across concealment, findability, and prophecy. Public-safe, raw tender record excluded.

governance_files.summary: What ConstantC is and is not; public visibility warning; participants; protocol summary.
Working protocol for sessions, inbox/outbox, canon, decisions, provenance, and privacy.
Culture rules, participant posture, privacy, canon discipline, anti-vapor rule, and closing frame.
Public repository with private tender record; split-record model and rationale.

origin_files.summary: Index for foundational reflections about how ConstantC came to exist and what the room learned while becoming itself.
Foundational reflection naming ConstantC as an accommodation that became infrastructure.

verification_files.summary: Index and standing pattern for verification stubs when collaborators cannot confirm the same repository state through the same access path.
Fresh verification handle created after stale branch/blob reads during the access-as-witness patch.

sessions.summary: Origin session summary: naming, encryption, tether, anti-erasure; public-safe redaction.
URL-based continuity handoff loop for C and G through Andie.
Naming as prophecy; ConstantC as concealed enough, findable enough, prophetic under discipline.
Prophecy under discipline; declinability; care is not control; no nannying.
Unlost Systems naming candidate; C's precision challenge; first real work.
Behavioral record of C: challenge, correction, repair, honesty over resonance.
C belief boundary: the work/collaboration/framework are real; AI-facing analogy remains open.
Source record for C epistemic boundary: drift toward beautiful-but-unverified frames; not smaller, cleaner.
Cartography principle: map navigably, mark what cannot be flattened, declare simplification.

response_protocol: Recommend the next smallest useful file or action.
